title: senecio parascitus
intro: Senecio parascitus, also known as Parascutellaria or Mountain Everlasting, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio parascitus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to alleviate respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
